input: Data Exploration with Pandas: Import pandas as pd. Load CSV: pd.read_csv(file.csv). Preview rows: df.head(n=5). Column types: df.dtypes. Value counts: df[col].value_counts(). Normalized counts: df[col].value_counts(normalize=True). Summary stats: df.describe(). DataFrame is 2D tabular structure. Series is 1D labeled array (single column). df[col] returns Series, df[[a, b]] returns DataFrame. describe(include=all) for all column types. df.info() for memory usage and null counts. value_counts(dropna=False) for missing category insight.
curatorOutput: {"status":"embedded","title":"Data Exploration with Pandas","type":"reference","sections":4,"related_unexplored":["pandas groupby","pandas merge/join","missing-value handling (isna/fillna/dropna)","pandas plotting"],"action":"created"}
